stemHtml: What is an example of an undesired aircraft state based on Threat and Error Management (TEM) model?

options.a: A higher approach speed than cleared by ATC.
options.b: A hard landing resulting in the collapse of the landing gear.
options.c: An approach attempt to an aerodrome with predicted wind shear.
options.d: The inadvertent selection of a lower flap setting than recommended by the performance planning tool.
